title: Codebreaking
puzzle: Why can hidden information change the course of wars?
insight: Codebreaking turns secrecy into vulnerability. When encrypted messages are understood, military plans, supply routes, and strategic timing can suddenly become visible.
key_ideas: Encrypted communication protects decisions and coordination.
Breaking a code reveals patterns as well as messages.
Information advantage can matter as much as weapons.
mind_blower: Wars are often decided not only by force, but by who understands the other side first.
next_curiosity: If secrecy shapes power in war, how does encryption shape power in everyday digital life?
narration_text: Why can hidden information change the course of wars? Codebreaking turns secrecy into vulnerability. When encrypted messages are understood, military plans, supply routes, and strategic timing can suddenly become visible. Encrypted communication protects decisions and coordination. Breaking a code reveals patterns as well as messages. Information advantage can matter as much as weapons. Wars are often decided not only by force, but by who understands the other side first. If secrecy shapes power in war, how does encryption shape power in everyday digital life?
